name: @theylovlj/ui-skill
description: Premium /ui design skill for Claude Code. v2.4 adds the mini-overhead-pill ban, gradient-text ban, 7-state delivery rule, elevation ladder, radius-scaling rule, named-tone requirement, and ~12 more anti-slop rules from a 5-skill research sweep. 17 photoreal device mockups, seamless marquees, responsive sizing, 41 animations, 28 recipes.
author: theylovlj
